title: A function algebra providing new Mergelyan type theorems in several complex variables
author_string: Javier Falcó, Paul M. Gauthier, Myrto Manolaki, Vassili Nestoridis
abstract: For compact sets $K\subset \mathbb C^{d}$, we introduce a subalgebra $A_{D}(K)$ of $A(K)$, which allows us to obtain Mergelyan type theorems for products of planar compact sets as well as for graphs of functions.
